nodes.name: e2e-source-kafka-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script for Kafka source connector, starting Kafka and Schema Registry then running SLT tests for various Kafka source scenarios.

nodes.name: e2e-source-mqtt-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script for MQTT source connector, starting an MQTT broker and running SLT tests verifying message ingestion.

nodes.name: e2e-source-mysql-cdc-reset.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that tests MySQL CDC source connector with cluster restarts and failover, verifying resumption of change capture after node recovery.

nodes.name: e2e-source-mysql-offline-schema-change.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that tests MySQL CDC source behavior during offline schema changes, verifying that schema evolution is handled correctly.

nodes.name: e2e-source-nats-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script for NATS source connector, starting a NATS server and running SLT tests for message ingestion.

nodes.name: e2e-source-pubsub-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script for Google Cloud Pub/Sub source connector, using the Pub/Sub emulator and running SLT tests for message ingestion.

nodes.name: e2e-source-pulsar-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script for Apache Pulsar source connector, starting a Pulsar standalone cluster and running SLT tests.

nodes.name: e2e-source-test.sh
nodes.summary: Generic CI e2e source connector test script that runs SLT tests for source connectors not requiring dedicated external services.

nodes.name: e2e-sqlserver-sink-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that starts a SQL Server container and runs SLT tests verifying the SQL Server sink connector, including CDC and upsert modes.

nodes.name: e2e-starrocks-sink-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that starts a StarRocks container and runs SLT tests verifying RisingWave's StarRocks sink connector.

nodes.name: create_starrocks_tables
nodes.summary: Creates required tables in StarRocks using MySQL client before running sink connector tests.

nodes.name: e2e-test-parallel-for-opendal.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that runs SLT tests in parallel specifically for the OpenDAL-backed storage engine variant.

nodes.name: e2e-test-parallel.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that runs SLT test suites in parallel across multiple RisingWave cluster instances to reduce test duration.

nodes.name: e2e-test-serial.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that runs SLT test suites serially in a single cluster, used for tests that require isolated execution or specific cluster states.

nodes.name: cluster_start
nodes.summary: Starts a RisingWave cluster via risedev with a given configuration profile and waits for it to become ready.

nodes.name: cluster_stop
nodes.summary: Stops the RisingWave cluster and cleans up process state after serial test execution.

nodes.name: e2e-time-travel-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script for the time-travel query feature, running SLT tests that read historical snapshots of tables.

nodes.name: flamegraph-env-build.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that builds RisingWave with debug symbols and profiling support for use in flamegraph performance analysis runs.

nodes.name: gen-flamegraph.sh
nodes.summary: Comprehensive CI script that runs NexMark benchmark workloads, collects CPU and heap flamegraphs using nperf/heaptrack, and uploads resulting SVG profiles to S3.

nodes.name: get_nexmark_queries_to_run
nodes.summary: Parses Buildkite environment labels to determine which NexMark benchmark queries to include in the flamegraph run.

nodes.name: install_all
nodes.summary: Installs all dependencies for flamegraph generation including nperf, heaptrack, AWS CLI, and NexMark benchmark tooling.

nodes.name: configure_nexmark_bench
nodes.summary: Generates the NexMark benchmark configuration file specifying query selection, event rates, and parallelism settings.

nodes.name: configure_rw
nodes.summary: Configures the RisingWave cluster settings for performance profiling, adjusting parallelism and memory tuning parameters.

nodes.name: gen_events
nodes.summary: Generates NexMark synthetic event data and publishes it to Kafka topics for consumption by the benchmark workload.

nodes.name: gen_heap_flamegraph
nodes.summary: Generates a heap memory flamegraph by running heaptrack against the RisingWave process during a benchmark run.

nodes.name: run_heap_flamegraph
nodes.summary: Orchestrates a full heap flamegraph benchmark run: starts RisingWave, loads NexMark queries, generates events, collects profile, and uploads results.

nodes.name: run_cpu_flamegraph
nodes.summary: Orchestrates a full CPU flamegraph benchmark run: starts RisingWave with nperf attached, runs NexMark queries, collects profiles, and uploads SVG results.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point for the flamegraph script, parsing run type (cpu/heap) from Buildkite labels and dispatching to the appropriate profiling pipeline.

nodes.name: gen-sqlsmith-snapshots.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that generates and uploads sqlsmith fuzzer snapshots for use in differential testing between versions.

nodes.name: integration-tests.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that runs the integration test suite in the `integration_tests/` directory, including various connector and protocol integration scenarios.

nodes.name: java-binding-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that builds and runs tests for the Java client binding library, verifying interoperability between Java and RisingWave's API.

nodes.name: multi-arch-docker.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that builds multi-architecture (amd64 + arm64) Docker manifest lists and pushes them to Docker Hub and GitHub Container Registry.

nodes.name: pushGchr
nodes.summary: Pushes a multi-arch Docker manifest to GitHub Container Registry (ghcr.io) with configurable tags.

nodes.name: pushDockerhub
nodes.summary: Pushes a multi-arch Docker manifest to Docker Hub with configurable tags.
